CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.name: Name of the enterprise security group to create. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -\_/. Must start with a letter. Length: 1–65.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.desc: Description of the enterprise security group to create.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules: List of security group rules to bind when creating the enterprise security group.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.direction: Traffic direction. Valid values: ingress or egress.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.ethertype: Network type. Valid values: IPv4 or IPv6.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.portRange: Destination port range. Supports continuous ports (e.g. "1-80") and discrete ports (e.g. "80,7000,8000", comma-separated, up to 15 discrete values). Defaults to 1–65535 if empty.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.sourcePortRange: Source port range. Supports continuous ports (e.g. "1-80") and discrete ports (e.g. "80,7000,8000", comma-separated, up to 15 discrete values). Defaults to 1–65535 if empty.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.protocol: Protocol type. Valid values: tcp, udp, or icmp.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.sourceIp: Source IP address. Use "all" to match all addresses.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.destIp: Destination IP address. Use "all" to match all addresses.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.localIp: Local IP address. Use "all" to match all addresses.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.action: Allow or deny traffic. Valid values: allow or deny.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.createdTime: Creation time of the enterprise security group rule.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.updatedTime: Last modification time of the enterprise security group rule.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.tags: List of tags to bind when creating the enterprise security group.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.tags.tagKey: Tag key. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 1–65.
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.tags.tagValue: Tag value. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 0–65.
